info.title: Faculytics API
info.description: This is the official API documentation for Faculytics

jobId.description: Job ID of the active or queued sync

trigger.description: What triggered the sync (manual or scheduled)

startedAt.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when the job was created

waitingCount.description: Number of waiting jobs in the queue

failedCount.description: Number of failed jobs retained in the queue

jobId.description: The BullMQ job ID for the enqueued sync

shortnameNote.example: EDP codes are examples. Final codes are generated at execution time.

courseIds.description: Moodle course IDs to enrol users into

sourceVersionId.description: UUID of the version to copy the schema from

externalId.description: The external identifier of the record

success.description: Whether the record was successfully processed

ingestionId.description: Unique identifier for the ingestion batch

dryRun.description: Whether the run was a dry-run

subjects.description: Course shortnames within caller scope, sorted alphabetically

count.description: Number of submissions for this faculty in the given semester

isActive.description: Whether the course is active in Moodle

moodleCategoryId.description: Moodle category ID for the department

userId.description: UUID of the user to assign the role to

moodleCategoryId.description: Moodle category ID to scope the role to

userId.description: UUID of the user to remove the role from

moodleCategoryId.description: Moodle category ID the role is scoped to
Moodle category ID for this program

departmentId.description: Optional department UUID to filter by

programId.description: Optional program UUID to filter by

downloadUrl.description: Presigned download URL, present when completed
